CLOU.name: Global X Cloud Computing ETF
CLOU.reasoning: Highest scanner conviction (7/10) with clear cloud capex tailwind confirmed by Google's earnings beat. Diversified cloud ETF reduces single-name risk while capturing the secular hyperscaler spend cycle. RSI 39.6 — not overbought, leaving room to run.

AVGO.name: Broadcom Inc.
AVGO.reasoning: Record revenue with strong AI networking/custom silicon franchise. Balanced RSI 50.7 offers entry without chasing. Buffett-style durable moat with dominant AI connectivity position.

ARKX.name: ARK Space Exploration & Innovation ETF
ARKX.reasoning: Non-semiconductor diversification (space/aerospace innovation) while staying RISK-ON aligned. RSI 46.9 — neutral, not extended. Non-correlated tilt in a RISK-ON regime.

TSM.name: Taiwan Semiconductor Manufacturing
TSM.reasoning: Foundry monopoly with pristine balance sheet and most direct beneficiary of AI silicon demand. Earnings beat confirms strong AI-driven foundry demand. RSI 60.1 — moderately strong, MA alignment positive in uptrend.
